description: Marketplace of paid HTTP APIs. USDC micropayments via x402 on Base. Non-custodial.
name: io.github.gatefareio/mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: EVM private key (32 bytes hex). Required for buyer tools (call_api, get_wallet_balance, estimate_cost). Stays on the user's machine.
environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional runtime spend cap in USD; call_api throws BUDGET_EXHAUSTED when reached.
environmentVariables.name: WALLET_BUDGET_USD

environmentVariables.description: Network identifier. Defaults to eip155:8453 (Base mainnet). Use eip155:84532 for Sepolia testnet.
environmentVariables.name: WALLET_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: Personal access token (gfpat_...) from gatefare.io/dashboard/tokens. Required for publisher tools (register_api, list_my_apis, update_api, get_revenue, distribute).
environmentVariables.name: GATEFARE_PAT

environmentVariables.description: Override the Gatefare base URL (defaults to https://gatefare.io). Useful for self-hosted deployments.
environmentVariables.name: GATEFARE_BASE_URL
